subject: SAMPLE: How does Zendesk work
description:
Hello, let's see how you or your agents can easily respond to and solve tickets.

Feel free to email additional customer test inquiries to **support@self-37540.zendesk.com**.

But first, let's start by solving one ticket.

Your Zendesk Team

subject: Test Email from Jupyter Notebook
description: This is an automated email sent from a Jupyter notebook. Testing email functionality.

subject: Update on mortgage application
description:
Hello,

I applied for a mortgage through your platform last week and uploaded all required documents. I haven’t received any updates since then and wanted to check on the status of my application.

Please let me know if you need any additional information from me.

Kind regards,
Emily S.

subject: SAMPLE TICKET: International shipping
description: Hello, I would like to buy one of your products and send it to my friend in Portugal. Do you ship overseas? How much would it cost?

subject: SAMPLE TICKET: Wrong address
description: Hi there, I just purchased an item and realized I used the wrong delivery address. Is it too late to update the delivery address? Is there a way I can make the change myself?

subject: Mortgage Pre-Approval Transaction Discrepancy
description:
Hello Wealthsimple Support,

I noticed a discrepancy in my mortgage pre-approval account. The transaction dated January 15th shows a processing fee of $450, but I was quoted $350 during my initial consultation. Could you please review this transaction and provide clarification on the difference?

Thank you,
Customer

subject: Unable to Access Mortgage Account Dashboard
raw_subject: Unable to Access Mortgage Account Dashboard
description:
Hello,

I've been trying to log into my Wealthsimple mortgage account for the past two days but keep getting an 'authentication failed' error. I've reset my password twice, but the issue persists. I need to review my mortgage documents urgently. Can you please help me regain access?

Regards,
Customer

subject: Missing Mortgage Payment Record
description:
Hi Wealthsimple Team,

I made my monthly mortgage payment on February 1st for $2,150, but it's not showing up in my transaction history. My bank confirms the payment was withdrawn, but your platform shows it as pending. Can you help me verify the accuracy of this transaction?

Best regards,
Customer

subject: Incorrect Mortgage Interest Calculation
description:
Dear Wealthsimple Support,

I've been reviewing my mortgage statements and noticed the interest charged this month seems higher than expected based on my 3.5% rate. The transaction shows $312 in interest, but my calculations suggest it should be around $275. Could you please verify the accuracy of this calculation?

Thank you,
Customer

subject: Mortgage Account Login Locked After Failed Attempts
raw_subject: Mortgage Account Login Locked After Failed Attempts
description:
Dear Support,

My mortgage account has been locked after several failed login attempts. I may have entered the wrong password, but now I can't access the password reset option. I need to access my account to download my mortgage statement for my accountant. Please help unlock my account.

Best,
Customer

subject: Two-Factor Authentication Not Working for Mortgage Portal
raw_subject: Two-Factor Authentication Not Working for Mortgage Portal
description:
Hi Wealthsimple Team,

I'm having trouble with two-factor authentication on my mortgage account. I'm not receiving the verification codes via SMS, and when I try to use the authenticator app, it says the code is invalid. I need to make a payment today. Please assist with authentication issues.

Thank you,
Customer

subject: TFSA Over-Contribution Concern - Need Clarification
description:
Hello Wealthsimple,

I'm worried I may have over-contributed to my TFSA this year. I contributed $6,500 in January but recently learned I had unused contribution room from previous years. Can you help me understand my exact contribution limit and whether I've exceeded it? I want to avoid CRA penalties.

Thank you,
Customer

subject: TFSA Withdrawal Tax Implications Question
description:
Hi Wealthsimple Team,

I withdrew $8,000 from my TFSA last month for an emergency. Will this withdrawal be taxed? Also, when can I re-contribute this amount without it counting against my annual limit? I want to make sure I'm following the tax rules correctly.

Regards,
Customer

subject: TFSA Transfer Between Institutions - Tax Rules
raw_subject: TFSA Transfer Between Institutions - Tax Rules
description:
Hello,

I'm planning to transfer my TFSA from another institution to Wealthsimple. Will this count as a withdrawal and re-contribution for tax purposes? I don't want to accidentally trigger an over-contribution penalty. Could you clarify the proper process to transfer without affecting my contribution room?

Best regards,
Customer

subject: TFSA Contribution Room After Moving from US
raw_subject: TFSA Contribution Room After Moving from US
description:
Dear Support,

I recently moved back to Canada after working in the US for 5 years. I'm confused about my TFSA contribution room. Do the years I was a non-resident count toward my contribution limit? I want to maximize my contributions while staying compliant with tax rules.

Thank you,
Customer
